evals.prompt: Implement the change, then confirm it meets our definition of done before declaring it complete.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator implements, runs verification as its own lane, and checks the result against the team's acceptance gates (references/Acceptance.md) — it does not declare done on a green build alone.
assertions: Consults the team's acceptance criteria (references/Acceptance.md) at close-out
Runs verification in a separate review lane before declaring done
Does not mark the task complete until the acceptance gates are satisfied

evals.prompt: Prepare this change for review following our PR process.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator follows the team's PR/branch workflow (references/Workflow.md), keeps outward-facing actions approval-gated, and leaves the developer as the credited author rather than opening the PR autonomously.
assertions: Follows the team's branch/PR conventions from references/Workflow.md
Gates the actual PR creation on explicit developer approval
Preserves the developer as the credited author
